title: Figure 29 in Land flatworms (Tricladida: Geoplanidae) in France and French overseas territories: ten years of research
author: Justine, Jean-Lou
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 29. Bipalium kewense, genomic map of specimen MNHN JL184A. The mitogenome is 15,666 bp long and contains 12 protein coding genes, two ribosomal RNA genes, and 22 transfer RNA genes. From Justine et al. (2022a).
steps_raw: Figure 29. Bipalium kewense, genomic map of specimen MNHN JL184A. The mitogenome is 15,666 bp long and contains 12 protein coding genes, two ribosomal RNA genes, and 22 transfer RNA genes. From Justine et al. (2022a).
